tests.description: [SKIPPED — known bug] LLM with one tool that succeeds and one tool that interrupts in the same round. On resume the OpenAI client rejects with `Duplicate value for 'tool_call_id'`. The cached completed-tool message and a re-emitted message for the same tool both end up in messages[]. Investigate prompt.ts:307-314 (cached-result short-circuit) and self.messagesJSON accumulation.

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: The output should be an object with a 'fact' field containing some text about cats, and a 'confirmation' field containing 'delete-files confirmed' or similar.
